---
title: "2D Gaussian Mixture Clustering Simulation Dashboard"
subtitle: "Evaluation of Wasserstein-based discrepancy measures and refinement strategies"
author: "Alexander"
date: "March 2026"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    page-layout: full
    fig-align: center
    fig-width: 15
    fig-height: 9
    embed-resources: true
params:
  results_dir: "results/simstudy/2D"
  scenario_filter: !expr c("scen1", "scen2")
  method_filter: !expr c("Wasserstein")
  clusterwise_filter: !expr c(TRUE, FALSE)
  nsweet_min: 1
  nsweet_max: 5
  nms_min: 0
  nms_max: 5
  nu0_min: 4
  nu0_max: 7
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(viridis)
library(DT)
library(patchwork)
library(salso)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.align = "center")
```

# Scenarios

```{r}
# Scenario 1 – moderate overlap
scen1 <- local({
  set.seed(1)
  N <- 100; K <- 3
  mu_true <- matrix(c(-2, 0, 0, 0, 2, 0), nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE)
  Sigma_true <- lapply(1:3, \(i) diag(2)*0.2)
  w_true <- c(0.3, 0.4, 0.3)
  cl_true <- sample(1:K, N, TRUE, w_true)
  y <- matrix(NA, N, 2)
  for (k in 1:K) {
    idx <- cl_true == k
    y[idx,] <- MASS::mvrnorm(sum(idx), mu_true[k,], Sigma_true[[k]])
  }
  tibble(y1 = y[,1], y2 = y[,2], cluster = factor(cl_true))
})

p1 <- scen1 |>
  ggplot(aes(x = y1, y = y2, colour = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.2, alpha = 0.85) +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(option = "plasma", end = 0.9) +
  labs(title = "Scenario 1", subtitle = "K = 3, N = 100, moderate overlap") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

# Scenario 2 – well separated
scen2 <- local({
  set.seed(2)
  N <- 150; K <- 4
  mu_true <- matrix(c(-4, 0, -1, 0, 1, 0, 4, 0), nrow = 4, byrow = TRUE)
  Sigma_true <- lapply(1:4, \(i) diag(2)*0.5)
  w_true <- rep(0.25, 4)
  cl_true <- sample(1:K, N, TRUE, w_true)
  y <- matrix(NA, N, 2)
  for (k in 1:K) {
    idx <- cl_true == k
    y[idx,] <- MASS::mvrnorm(sum(idx), mu_true[k,], Sigma_true[[k]])
  }
  tibble(y1 = y[,1], y2 = y[,2], cluster = factor(cl_true))
})

p2 <- scen2 |>
  ggplot(aes(x = y1, y = y2, colour = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.2, alpha = 0.85) +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(option = "viridis", end = 0.9) +
  labs(title = "Scenario 2", subtitle = "K = 4, N = 150, well separated") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

cowplot::plot_grid(p1, p2, ncol = 2)

```



```{r}
results_dir <- params$results_dir

# ── 1. Load only the simulation result files ────────────────────────────────
files <- list.files(results_dir, pattern = "^sim_.*\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)

all_results <- map_dfr(files, readRDS) |>
  mutate(
    scenario_label = case_when(
      scenario == "scen1" ~ "Scenario 1 (moderate overlap)",
      scenario == "scen2" ~ "Scenario 2 (well separated)",
      TRUE ~ scenario
    ),
    clusterwise_label = if_else(clusterwise, "Yes (clusterwise)", "No (global mixture)")
  )

# ── 2. Load posterior objects and true labels once ───────────────────────────
scen1_post <- readRDS(file.path(results_dir, "scen1_post.rds"))
scen2_post <- readRDS(file.path(results_dir, "scen2_post.rds"))

# True labels (you already have them in scen1_data / scen2_data, but reload if needed)
scen1_true <- readRDS(file.path(results_dir, "scen1_data.rds"))$cluster_true
scen2_true <- readRDS(file.path(results_dir, "scen2_data.rds"))$cluster_true

# ── 3. Compute consensus clusterings and ARI against truth — once per scenario ─
binder_scen1 <- salso(scen1_post$clustering_matrix, loss = binder())
vi_scen1     <- salso(scen1_post$clustering_matrix, loss = VI())
ari_binder_scen1 <- adjustedRandIndex(binder_scen1, scen1_true)
ari_vi_scen1     <- adjustedRandIndex(vi_scen1,     scen1_true)

binder_scen2 <- salso(scen2_post$clustering_matrix, loss = binder())
vi_scen2     <- salso(scen2_post$clustering_matrix, loss = VI())
ari_binder_scen2 <- adjustedRandIndex(binder_scen2, scen2_true)
ari_vi_scen2     <- adjustedRandIndex(vi_scen2,     scen2_true)

# ── 4. Attach these fixed values to every row in filtered ────────────────────
filtered <- all_results |>
  filter(
    scenario %in% params$scenario_filter,
    clusterwise %in% params$clusterwise_filter,
    n_sweet >= params$nsweet_min,
    n_sweet <= params$nsweet_max,
    n_ms >= params$nms_min,
    n_ms <= params$nms_max,
    nu_0 >= params$nu0_min,
    nu_0 <= params$nu0_max
  ) |>
  mutate(
    ARI_Binder_consensus = if_else(scenario == "scen1", ari_binder_scen1, ari_binder_scen2),
    ARI_VI_consensus     = if_else(scenario == "scen1", ari_vi_scen1,     ari_vi_scen2)
  )

cat("Loaded", nrow(all_results), "configurations.\n")
cat("Computed consensus ARIs vs truth: ",
    "Scen1 Binder =", round(ari_binder_scen1, 3), 
    "| VI =", round(ari_vi_scen1, 3), "\n",
    "Scen2 Binder =", round(ari_binder_scen2, 3), 
    "| VI =", round(ari_vi_scen2, 3), "\n")

```


```{r}


filtered |>
  group_by(scenario_label, clusterwise_label, n_sweet, n_ms, nu_0) |>
  summarise(
    `N runs`                  = n(),
    `Mean ARI (vs truth)`     = mean(ARI, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(3),
    `SD ARI (vs truth)`       = sd(ARI, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(3),
    `ARI vs Binder consensus` = first(ARI_Binder_consensus) |> round(3),
    `ARI vs VI consensus`     = first(ARI_VI_consensus) |> round(3),
    `Mean D`                  = mean(final_D, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(4),
    `Mean sweets`             = mean(n_accepted_sweets, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(1),
    `Mean merges`             = mean(n_accepted_merges, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(1),
    `Mean splits`             = mean(n_accepted_splits, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  DT::datatable(
    options = list(
      pageLength = 12,
      dom = "Bfrtip",
      buttons = c("csv", "excel")
    ),
    extensions = "Buttons",
    filter = "top",
    caption = "Summary statistics – filtered results (including consensus ARI)"
  )


```



## Visualisations

### Adjusted Rand Index vs. true labels

```{r}

filtered |>
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(n_sweet), y = ARI, colour = clusterwise_label)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.25, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.22, dodge.width = 0.75),
             size = 2.6, alpha = 0.9) +
  facet_wrap(~ scenario_label, ncol = 2) +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(option = "C", name = "Clusterwise Wasserstein") +
  labs(
    title = "Adjusted Rand Index vs. true clustering",
    subtitle = "Higher is better — direct comparison to ground truth",
    x = "Number of sweetening iterations (n_sweet)",
    y = "Adjusted Rand Index (ARI)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

```

## Visualisations

### Adjusted Rand Index vs. true labels + posterior consensus benchmarks




```{r}

# Prepare reference lines (one value per scenario × consensus type)
ref_lines <- filtered |>
  distinct(scenario_label, ARI_Binder_consensus, ARI_VI_consensus) |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(ARI_Binder_consensus, ARI_VI_consensus),
    names_to = "consensus_type",
    values_to = "consensus_ARI"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    consensus_type = case_when(
      consensus_type == "ARI_Binder_consensus" ~ "Binder consensus",
      consensus_type == "ARI_VI_consensus"     ~ "VI consensus"
    )
  )

filtered |>
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(n_sweet), y = ARI, colour = clusterwise_label)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.25, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.22, dodge.width = 0.75),
             size = 2.6, alpha = 0.9) +
  
  # Horizontal reference lines: both dashed, same non-black color
  geom_hline(
    data = ref_lines,
    aes(yintercept = consensus_ARI, linetype = consensus_type),
    colour = "#4B6584",           # muted blue-gray (change to any other hex if desired)
    linewidth = 0.9,
    linetype = "dashed"           # both lines dashed
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ scenario_label, ncol = 1, labeller = label_wrap_gen(multi_line = TRUE)) +
  
  scale_colour_viridis_d(option = "C", name = "Clusterwise Wasserstein") +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c("Binder consensus" = "dashed", "VI consensus" = "dashed"),
    name = "Posterior consensus benchmark"
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Adjusted Rand Index vs. true clustering",
    subtitle = "Boxplots: method performance | Dashed lines: ARI of SALSO consensus vs. truth",
    x = "Number of sweetening iterations (n_sweet)",
    y = "Adjusted Rand Index (ARI)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "vertical",
    legend.margin = margin(t = -10),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold")
  )

```
